sections.label: Technique
sections.placeholder: Multidetector CT of the brain acquired after intravenous iodinated contrast. Multiplanar reformats reviewed. State kVp/contrast volume/phase and DLP as per local dose policy.

sections.label: Comparison
sections.placeholder: Date and type of relevant prior imaging, if available.

sections.label: Findings
sections.placeholder:
Cerebral hemispheres / grey–white differentiation: 
Enhancing abnormality (mass, abscess, vascular lesion) — pattern of enhancement, size (mm), location: 
Intracranial haemorrhage by compartment — extra-axial (epidural / subdural / subarachnoid), intraparenchymal / intraventricular (thickness mm): 
Ventricles and CSF spaces: 
Midline shift (mm at septum/foramen of Monro): 
Basal cisterns (patent vs effaced): 
Mass effect / herniation (subfalcine, uncal, tonsillar): 
Posterior fossa and brainstem: 
Vascular territories (acute infarct): 
Calvarium and skull base: 
Visualised paranasal sinuses / mastoids / orbits:

sections.label: Impression
sections.placeholder: Concise, prioritised bullets, most time-critical first. Characterise any enhancing abnormality (mass / abscess / vascular) and state presence/absence of acute intracranial haemorrhage by compartment with hematoma thickness and midline shift (mm), plus any mass effect or herniation. Critical-result communication language for haemorrhage, herniation or shift, and approved follow-up where indicated.

sections.label: Recommendations
sections.placeholder: Evidence-based follow-up or correlation, drawn from approved phrasing, only if indicated.
